summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 open candidate PRs. No GitHub mutations planned; security-sensitive refs are quarantined, and ordinary useful PRs are kept for maintainer review or author follow-up based on hydrated preflight state.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR with proof and no duplicate/superseded evidence in this shard; keep open for maintainer review.
Security-boundary-labeled item marked security-sensitive by preflight; route only this PR to central OpenClaw security handling.
Maintainer-owned draft with real implementation value; classify independently and leave for maintainer review.
Security-boundary and skill revocation/quarantine scope is out of ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup; route this exact PR.
Credential redaction and security-boundary labeling make this security-sensitive; route only this PR.
Useful focused fix for an open issue with proof; keep open rather than close or merge in plan mode.
Focused test PR with useful Windows coverage and no dedupe target; keep open for maintainer judgment.
Focused test-only PR with reviewer history but no closeout basis; keep independently open.
Unresolved technical-correctness judgment on a small test PR with failed proof and actionable bot findings.
Focused test coverage PR with a plausible resolved reviewer concern; keep open for maintainer review.

needs_human: #90215 requires maintainer judgment or author follow-up because the hydrated bot review still contains actionable test-probe concerns and the real behavior proof check failed.
